scope: Pass C monetary column binding on dense discounted tables

options.name: Prompt-only refinement
options.description: Expand TABLE_EXTRACTION_SYSTEM_PROMPT with more negative examples, EUR/% suffix rules, and corrected Pomodor example (qty 1, €27.56, €22.05).
options.evidence: column-selection-deep-dive: prompt already mandates column-faithful; violations persist; POMODOR negative example mismatches visible row

options.name: Post-Pass-C validator only
options.description: Deterministic rules A–F on GPT triple after extractTableItemsFromImage; flag or reject suspicious rows.
options.false_positive_risk: HIGH without discount exemption — Rule A 37.5% FP
options.suitability_1000_plus: PARTIAL — safety net only; 25% undetected self-consistent errors
options.evidence: monetary-column-validation-audit: 9/12 detected, 3 NO (Prosciutto refined 9.17/36.54, Pomodor 27.56/54.20); Rule B 0 FP

options.name: Geometry header-anchored crop only
options.description: Extend detectTableBounds / cropTableRegionForLineItems to always include header row (Emporio headers at y≈430, crop top y≈456).
options.suitability_1000_plus: GOOD for header-clipped templates; insufficient alone for Bocconcino
options.evidence: column-selection-deep-dive: Bocconcino crop NOT ambiguous but GPT still fails; Emporio headers clipped → MARGINAL

options.name: Dedicated monetary-column GPT pass (Pass C²)
options.description: Second vision pass on same table crop (or per-row crops) returning column-labeled numerics: gross_unit, discount_pct, net_total.
options.suitability_1000_plus: GOOD — adds latency/cost (~1 extra GPT call per invoice)
options.evidence: column-shift-audit: first divergence Pass C only; structured column labels address indistinguishable triples

options.name: OCR-first column extraction
options.description: Tesseract or column-slice OCR on table crop; bind x-positions to headers; GPT fills names only.
options.false_positive_risk: MEDIUM — OCR digit errors on dense tables
options.evidence: column-shift-audit: no OCR stage today; dense 286px 4-value rows challenge slice alignment

options.name: Retry / multi-run voting
options.description: Re-run Pass C 3–5×; pick modal unit/total or lowest-variance answer.
options.false_positive_risk: MEDIUM — may converge on wrong self-consistent answer
options.suitability_1000_plus: POOR — 3–5× cost; discount-line audit 80% run consistency on different family
options.evidence: column-shift-audit: 5-run variance — not deterministic; Pomodor run 1 stable wrong (€20); Prosciutto run 4 correct but not modal

options.name: Expanded Pass C schema (single pass)
options.description: Change JSON schema to emit gross_unit_price, discount_pct, line_total_net per row; derive unit_price in code.
options.suitability_1000_plus: GOOD — one pass, explicit column binding in output
options.evidence: validation audit: triple alone insufficient; column metadata enables Rule B without guessing

options.name: Hybrid: Header crop + structured monetary binding + validator gate (PREFERRED)
options.description: Phase 1 geometry header inclusion; Phase 2 expanded schema or Pass C² for column-labeled numerics; Phase 3 deterministic bindMonetaryColumns + Rule B/E gate; Phase 4 targeted row retry on flagged rows only.
options.false_positive_risk: LOW — Rule B 0 FP; discount-line exemption preserves legitimate qty×unit≠total
options.suitability_1000_plus: EXCELLENT — deterministic layers + bounded GPT retry
options.evidence: Synthesizes all audits: fixes Emporio header clip, adds column metadata for indistinguishable triples, gates with 0-FP Rule B

options.name: Supplier template registry
options.description: Detect supplier layout; hard-code column order maps (Emporio, Bocconcino, Mammafiore).
options.maintenance_burden: VERY HIGH — N templates × layout changes
options.suitability_1000_plus: POOR at scale — unbounded template growth
options.evidence: root-cause-consolidation: 1000+ invoice diversity; only 2 stable column-shift products audited
